sql_array: CREATE TABLE phrases (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), advertiser_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO phrases (id, content, advertiser_id) VALUES (1, 'simple test', NULL), (2, 'complex test', 1), (3, 'another phrase', 1);
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL((SELECT content FROM phrases WHERE id = 1), 'dba', (SELECT xpath_integer('/ad/id') FROM dual WHERE xpath_integer('/ad/id') = 1));
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL(NULLIF((SELECT content FROM phrases WHERE advertiser_id IS NULL), ''), 'dba', 'dba') + CAST((SELECT MAX(id) FROM phrases) AS VARCHAR);

SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL((SELECT NULLIF(content, '') FROM phrases WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM phrases WHERE content LIKE '%test%')), 'dba', (SELECT xpath_integer('/ad/advertiser') FROM dual));
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL((SELECT content FROM phrases WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM phrases)), 'dba', 'dba');
CREATE TABLE ad_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ad_content VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ad_data (id, ad_content) VALUES (1, 'Ad content 1'), (2, 'Ad content 2');

SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL((SELECT MAX(content) FROM phrases WHERE LENGTH(content) > 0), 'dba', (SELECT xpath_integer('/ad/advertiser') FROM dual WHERE xpath_integer('/ad/advertiser') IS NOT NULL));
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL((SELECT content FROM phrases ORDER BY LENGTH(content) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL(cast(NULL AS VARCHAR) || (SELECT content FROM phrases WHERE id = 2), 'dba', NULL);
